name: YouTube
shortDescription: Connects FlowRunner to the YouTube Data API and YouTube Analytics/Reporting APIs over OAuth2, letting you manage channels, videos, playlists, comments, captions, subscriptions, live streams, and pull analytics for the authenticated account.

actions.name: Get My Channel
actions.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's primary YouTube channel including snippet, statistics, branding, and content details. Quota cost: 1 unit per requested part.

actions.name: Get Channel
actions.description: Retrieves a YouTube channel by ID, handle (e.g., @MrBeast), or legacy username. Resolves the appropriate filter automatically. Quota cost: 1 unit per requested part.

actions.name: Update Channel Branding
actions.description: Updates the authenticated user's channel branding settings (title, description, country, keywords, default language).

actions.name: Restore Channel Branding
actions.description: Restores channel branding from a previously captured snapshot. Pass the entire brandingSettings object (e.g., from Get My Channel). Use when reverting changes from Update Channel Branding.

actions.name: Test Connection
actions.description: Verify the YouTube connection is working. Returns the connected channel's basic info — useful for setup wizards or health checks.

actions.name: Get Video by URL
actions.description: Look up a video using a YouTube URL (watch link, shorts, embed, youtu.be) instead of an ID. Returns the same payload as Get Video.

actions.name: Get Playlist by URL
actions.description: Look up a playlist by URL or ID. Returns the playlist's snippet, status, and item count.

actions.name: Get Latest Videos
actions.description: Get the most recent videos uploaded by a channel, identified by URL, @handle, username, or UC... ID. Cheap (3 quota units) compared to a search-based approach.

actions.name: Summarize Channel
actions.description: One-call channel summary: identity, statistics, and latest 5 videos. Useful for AI dashboards and channel cards.

actions.name: List My Videos
actions.description: Get videos uploaded to your YouTube channel, sorted newest-first. Returns video IDs, titles, descriptions, and thumbnails. Use for content audits, dashboards, or piping recent uploads into a workflow. (API quota: 2 units per page — efficient compared to search.)

actions.name: Get Video
actions.description: Retrieves full metadata for one or more videos by ID, including statistics, content details, and status. Quota cost: 1 unit per part.

actions.name: List Popular Videos
actions.description: Get currently trending videos in a country, optionally filtered by category. Returns titles, view counts, and channel info. Use for trend analysis, content strategy, or surfacing popular content.

actions.name: Upload Video
actions.description: Upload a video to YouTube. Pick a video file from Flowrunner storage or paste any publicly fetchable URL. Set title, description, tags, category, privacy, and optional schedule time. Use for publishing pipelines, automated re-uploads, or content syndication. (API quota: 1600 units — heavy; ~6 uploads per default daily quota.)

actions.name: Update Video
actions.description: Updates metadata for an existing video. Only provided fields are changed; others are preserved via read-modify-write.

actions.name: Delete Video
actions.description: Deletes a video. Authenticated user must own the video.

actions.name: Rate Video
actions.description: Sets the authenticated user's rating on a video (like, dislike, or none).

actions.name: Get Video Rating
actions.description: Returns the authenticated user's current rating(s) on one or more videos.

actions.name: Report Video Abuse
actions.description: Reports a video for abuse. Provide a reason ID from Get Video Abuse Report Reasons.

actions.name: Set Video Thumbnail
actions.description: Sets a custom thumbnail for a video. Image must be JPEG/PNG, max 2MB.

actions.name: List Playlists
actions.description: Lists playlists owned by a channel or by ID. Defaults to authenticated user's playlists.

actions.name: Create Playlist
actions.description: Creates a new playlist on the authenticated user's channel.

actions.name: Update Playlist
actions.description: Updates an existing playlist's metadata.

actions.name: Delete Playlist
actions.description: Deletes a playlist owned by the authenticated user.

actions.name: List Playlist Items
actions.description: Lists items in a playlist.

actions.name: Add Video to Playlist
actions.description: Adds a video to a playlist. Optionally specify position.

actions.name: Update Playlist Item
actions.description: Updates a playlist item (e.g., reorder by changing position).

actions.name: Remove Playlist Item
actions.description: Removes an item from a playlist.

actions.name: Search Videos
actions.description: Search YouTube for videos by keywords with filters for duration, definition, captions, recency, and live status. Returns video titles, channel info, and thumbnails. Use for content discovery, trend research, or building dynamic feeds. Statistics (view counts, likes) are NOT included by default — enable "Enrich Statistics" to add them in one extra call. (API quota: 100 units per call, +1 if enriching.)

actions.name: Search Channels
actions.description: Search YouTube for channels matching keywords. Returns channel titles, IDs, and descriptions. Use for finding creators, competitor research, or building channel directories. (API quota: 100 units per call.)

actions.name: Search Playlists
actions.description: Search YouTube for public playlists by keywords. Returns playlist titles, owners, and IDs. Use for content curation discovery or finding curated collections. (API quota: 100 units per call.)

actions.name: List Subscriptions
actions.description: Lists subscriptions. By default returns the authenticated user's subscriptions.

actions.name: Subscribe to Channel
actions.description: Subscribes the authenticated user to a channel.

actions.name: Unsubscribe
actions.description: Removes a subscription. Pass the subscription ID (not channel ID) — get it from List Subscriptions.

actions.name: List Comment Threads
actions.description: Lists top-level comment threads on a video, channel, or all threads related to a channel.

actions.name: List Comment Replies
actions.description: Lists replies to a parent comment.

actions.name: Post Top-Level Comment
actions.description: Posts a top-level comment on a video or channel discussion.

actions.name: Post Comment Reply
actions.description: Posts a reply to an existing comment.

actions.name: Update Comment
actions.description: Updates an existing comment owned by the authenticated user.

actions.name: Delete Comment
actions.description: Deletes a comment.

actions.name: Set Comment Moderation Status
actions.description: Sets the moderation status for one or more comments. Channel owners only.

actions.name: Mark Comments as Spam
actions.description: Marks one or more comments as spam.

actions.name: List Captions
actions.description: Lists caption tracks for a video.

actions.name: Download Caption
actions.description: Downloads a caption track. Returns text content. Quota cost: 200 units.

actions.name: Upload Caption
actions.description: Uploads a caption track for a video.

actions.name: Delete Caption
actions.description: Deletes a caption track.

actions.name: List Activities
actions.description: Lists recent activities for a channel (uploads, likes, etc.).

actions.name: Run Analytics Query
actions.description: Run a custom YouTube Analytics query with full control over metrics, dimensions, filters, and sort. Use when the canned reports (Channel Overview, Top Videos, etc.) don't cover your use case. Defaults to the authenticated channel.

actions.name: Get Channel Overview
actions.description: Returns headline channel metrics for a date range (views, watch time, subs gained, likes, comments, shares). Optionally includes revenue if monetary scope is enabled.

actions.name: Get Channel Time Series
actions.description: Returns daily time-series for a channel across requested metrics.

actions.name: Get Top Videos
actions.description: Returns top videos for a channel ranked by a metric (default: views).

actions.name: Get Video Analytics
actions.description: Returns analytics for one or more specific videos.

actions.name: Get Demographics Report
actions.description: Returns audience demographics breakdown by age group and gender.

actions.name: Get Traffic Source Report
actions.description: Returns traffic source breakdown for the channel (where viewers come from).

actions.name: Get Device Report
actions.description: Returns viewership breakdown by device type and operating system.

actions.name: Get Geography Report
actions.description: Returns country-level breakdown for the channel.

actions.name: List Analytics Groups
actions.description: Lists analytics groups owned by the authenticated user. Groups are custom collections of videos/playlists/channels for analytics aggregation.

actions.name: Create Analytics Group
actions.description: Creates a new analytics group.

actions.name: Delete Analytics Group
actions.description: Deletes an analytics group.

actions.name: List Analytics Group Items
actions.description: Lists items inside an analytics group.

actions.name: List Report Types
actions.description: List the report types YouTube can generate as bulk daily CSVs. Use to discover which scheduled reports you can subscribe to.

actions.name: List Reporting Jobs
actions.description: List the reporting jobs you've already scheduled. Each job generates a daily CSV for one report type.

actions.name: Create Reporting Job
actions.description: Schedule a daily CSV report. Once created, YouTube starts generating reports for the chosen report type every day; download via List Reports + Get Report. Idempotent on (reportTypeId, name).

actions.name: Delete Reporting Job
actions.description: Cancel a scheduled reporting job. Already-generated reports remain available for ~60 days.

actions.name: List Reports
actions.description: List the daily-generated reports available for a job. Each report covers one calendar day.

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Get a single generated report. Choose 'metadata' for the descriptor, 'raw' to download the CSV text, or 'parsed' to download and parse into rows of objects.

actions.name: List Live Broadcasts
actions.description: List your live broadcasts filtered by lifecycle status. Returns titles, scheduled times, and live chat IDs.

actions.name: Create Live Broadcast
actions.description: Schedule a new live broadcast. Returns the broadcast resource including the live chat ID.

actions.name: Update Live Broadcast
actions.description: Update broadcast metadata. Only provided fields are changed.

actions.name: Delete Live Broadcast
actions.description: Delete a scheduled or completed broadcast.

actions.name: Transition Broadcast
actions.description: Move a broadcast through its lifecycle (testing → live → complete). Bound stream must be active before transitioning to 'live'.

actions.name: Bind Broadcast to Stream
actions.description: Bind a live ingestion stream to a broadcast (or unbind by passing empty Stream).

actions.name: Insert Cuepoint
actions.description: Insert an ad cuepoint into a live broadcast. Channel must be partnered/monetized.

actions.name: List Live Streams
actions.description: List your ingestion streams (RTMP/HLS endpoints with stream keys).

actions.name: Create Live Stream
actions.description: Create an ingestion stream config (RTMP/HLS endpoint). Returns the stream key needed to broadcast.

actions.name: Update Live Stream
actions.description: Update an ingestion stream's title or CDN config.

actions.name: Delete Live Stream
actions.description: Delete an ingestion stream config.

actions.name: List Live Chat Messages
actions.description: Poll messages from a live chat. Honor the returned pollingIntervalMillis between calls. Only works while the broadcast is testing/live.

actions.name: Post Live Chat Message
actions.description: Post a text message to a live chat.

actions.name: Delete Live Chat Message
actions.description: Delete a live chat message. Owner or moderators only.

actions.name: List Live Chat Moderators
actions.description: List moderators of a live chat.

actions.name: Add Live Chat Moderator
actions.description: Promote a viewer to chat moderator for an active live chat.

actions.name: Remove Live Chat Moderator
actions.description: Remove a chat moderator.

actions.name: Ban User from Live Chat
actions.description: Ban a user from a live chat (permanent or for a duration).

actions.name: Remove Live Chat Ban
actions.description: Lift a live chat ban.

actions.name: List Super Chats
actions.description: List Super Chat events from your channel (last 30 days). Authenticated channel must be the recipient.

idealUseCases: Automate publishing: upload videos, set thumbnails, manage playlists, and update metadata as part of a content pipeline.
Moderate and engage: monitor comment threads, reply, mark spam, and run live-chat moderation during streams.
Report on performance: pull channel/video analytics, demographics, traffic-source, device, and geography reports into spreadsheets or dashboards.
React to channel activity: trigger downstream workflows when a new video, comment, or subscriber appears.
Operate live events: create and transition broadcasts, bind streams, insert cuepoints, and manage live chat.
agentIdeas: When **YouTube** "On New Video on Channel" fires, use **YouTube** "Summarize Channel" plus **Notion** "Create Page" to log each upload with a channel summary into a content tracker.

On a **YouTube** "On New Comment on Video" trigger, evaluate sentiment and call **Slack** "Send Message To Channel" to alert the community team, optionally replying via **YouTube** "Post Comment Reply".
Pull performance with **YouTube** "Get Channel Time Series" and "Get Top Videos", then use **Google Sheets** "Add Row" to append the metrics into a weekly analytics report.
